strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks, workshops, and open-source libraries, indicating communication and influence skills
concerns: No director-level or principal-level scope evident; career has remained at senior/staff IC on feature and product teams
AI experience is recent and narrow (MCP tooling since 2025), far from the 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products' the role requires
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of strategic advisory work with executives, customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Meets minimum bar: 15+ years engineering, BS in CS, entrepreneurial experience

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum qualifications with nearly two decades of solid, versatile engineering work, genuine open-source founding experience, and a habit of public teaching and speaking. However, this role is a director-level AI strategy position that demands recognized AI thought leadership, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and experience advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. The resume shows a strong senior/staff engineer whose AI exposure began only in 2025 with agent tooling, with no evidence of operating at the strategic altitude the role requires. The gap is in level and AI depth rather than engineering competence.
